description: Auditor binding spec for the aml_txn_monitoring_minimal COAF-report re-derivation (Axis-2 spec-pinned dispatch). The representative re-derived output is the per-customer coaf_report_triggered decision (payload/coaf_reports.json customers -> coaf_report_triggered boolean), emitted as a deterministic ordered list of {customer_id, coaf_report_triggered} sorted ascending by customer_id. It is recomputed by re-aggregating per-customer features (max count of >R$10,000 transactions in any 24h window; max count of R$9,000-R$9,999 cash deposits in any 7-day window; peer-group z-score of mean transaction size) from the committed raw stream (transactions/transactions.jsonl) plus the committed peer baselines (baselines/customer_baselines.json), then evaluating the committed rule tree (rule_tree/rule_tree.json) with trigger = ANY(velocity > t0, structuring > t1, abs(peer_z) > t2). The feature + rule-tree evaluation logic lives in the verifier primitive (aml_txn_monitoring_recompute); the comparator is pinned HERE by the auditor (exact, no params -- an ordered list of {customer_id, coaf_report_triggered} records compared element-wise), not producer-asserted. A producer who ships a spec the auditor did not anchor (different SHA / different primitive_id) gets a SHA the anchor does not list, so dispatch fails closed.
